unit.comment: // Let Catch provide the required interfaces:

function.name: operator<<
print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::SourceLineInfo const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, Catch::MessageInfo const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, std::vector<Catch::MessageInfo> const& v )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::TestRunInfo const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::Counts const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::Totals const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::TestRunStats const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::TestCaseInfo const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::TestCaseStats const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::SectionInfo const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::SectionStats const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::AssertionInfo const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::AssertionResultData const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::AssertionResult const& info )

function.name: print
function.parameter_list: ( std::ostream& os, int const level, std::string const& title, Catch::AssertionStats const& info )
